Label: /FR-U-10/
Issue: Does not specify the format for user-imported neural network topologies
Correction: The system shall accept user-imported neural network topologies in the Open Neural Network eXchange (ONNX) format.

Label: /FR-U-60/
Issue: Does not specify the supported file formats for input images
Correction: The system shall support input images in JPEG, JPG, and PNG formats.

Label: /FR-U-80/
Issue: Does not specify the behavior if the inference fails
Correction: The system shall display an error message if the inference fails, detailing the reason for the failure.

Label: /FR-U-100/
Issue: Does not specify the format for exporting results and diagnostic data
Correction: The system shall export results and diagnostic data in a CSV format.

Label: /FR-U-110/
Issue: Does not specify the location where results and diagnostic data will be saved
Correction: The system shall prompt the user to select a location on the local device to save the results and diagnostic data.

Label: /FR-A-30/
Issue: Does not specify the types of conflicts that will be checked for validity
Correction: The system shall check for conflicts such as incompatible neural network topologies and hardware components, and unsupported input image formats.

Label: /PD10/
Issue: Does not specify the minimum height and width for input images
Correction: The system shall support input images with a minimum height and width of 224 pixels.

Label: /PD20/
Issue: Does not specify the hardware compatibility requirements for imported neural networks
Correction: The system shall ensure that imported neural network topologies are compatible with the specified hardware components.
